description_long: This is a high-rise apartment building complex consisting of three distinct towers, each with a modern rectangular form and multiple stories. The facades are clad in a combination of beige and light brown materials, with vertical blue-tinted window strips running the height of each tower. The buildings feature prominent balconies on nearly every floor, creating a rhythmic pattern along the exterior. The rooftops are flat and dark, with some geometric structures or mechanical units visible. The ground level is set back with a darker base, possibly indicating entrances or lobby areas. The overall design is symmetrical and contemporary, suitable for dense urban environments.
description: A modern, multi-tower high-rise apartment complex with beige facades, blue-tinted windows, and numerous balconies.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facades of all three towers, with prominent balconies and vertical window strips.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the towers and the alignment of windows and balconies along the sides.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facades and the consistent balcony and window arrangement across the towers.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, emphasizing the building's rectangular footprint and vertical elements.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are arranged in vertical strips with regular spacing, creating a symmetrical and repetitive pattern across all facades.
